creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Can confirm, I'm experiencing the same, plus the login prompt screen is having black background artifacts for me (hovering mouse over some elements in it 'fixes' the background around those elements https://i.imgur.com/XgXCiYp.png https://i.imgur.com/mCA1CZr.png ).

Also, not sure if it's relevant, but I get these messages/errors in the console:

skype &
[1] 38821
/usr/local/share/skype/skype: /lib/skype_oss_wrapper/libpulse.so.0: no version information available (required by /usr/lib/qt47/libphonon.so.4)
/usr/local/share/skype/skype: /lib/skype_oss_wrapper/libpulse.so.0: no version information available (required by /lib/libpulse-mainloop-glib.so.0)
Fontconfig error: "/etc/fonts/conf.d/10-scale-bitmap-fonts.conf", line 72: non-double matrix element
Fontconfig error: "/etc/fonts/conf.d/10-scale-bitmap-fonts.conf", line 72: non-double matrix element
Fontconfig warning: "/etc/fonts/conf.d/10-scale-bitmap-fonts.conf", line 80: saw unknown, expected number

[1]  + done       skype
